title: arifOS Canonical Tool Output Schema
description: Canonical output contract for all arifOS MCP tools. Every tool output must conform to this schema. Governs the public API layer (arifos_000_init, arifos_111_sense, arifos_222_witness, etc.) and defines the invariant block structure required for AGI-level constitutional intelligence.
supersedes: tool_registry_v2.json internal tool metadata (retained as capability registry)
note: This contract defines output structure. Input schema per tool is defined in tool_registry_v2.json inputSchema fields. This contract governs runtime output compliance.

canonical_tool_name.description: Must equal tool field — enforces no legacy name leakage

verdict.description: Tool's native verdict. SEAL/HOLD/VOID may only be issued by arifos_888_judge. All other tools emit CLAIM_ONLY or PARTIAL.

ok.description: Boolean success flag — true iff verdict is CLAIM_ONLY or SEAL

confidence.description: Epistemic confidence. MUST be derived from internal metrics — not arbitrary. AGI must never claim absolute certainty. Range: [0.03, 0.97]

uncertainty_acknowledged.description: Must be true. AGI-level tools must explicitly acknowledge bounded rationality

assumptions.description: List of explicit assumptions. Each assumption must reference an input field or external evidence source. Empty array = invariant failure.

reasoning_hash.description: Deterministic hash of reasoning payload for traceability. Must be recomputable from content.

input_hash.description: Hash of input payload. Must match actual request for traceability.

floors_evaluated.description: Constitutional floors evaluated during this tool execution. Union with floors_deferred must cover all required floors for this tool.

floors_deferred.description: Floors not evaluated with documented reason. Deferred floors cannot include required floors without explicit justification.

original_tool_verdict.description: Tool's original verdict before constitutional_guard override. Used for forensic non-self-sealing detection. Only present if guard modified the verdict.

meta_intelligence.description: AGI self-awareness block. All fields must be true. Any false = invariant failure.

metrics.description: Thermodynamic and floor metrics. Must include tri_witness_score when F3 is evaluated.

tri_witness_score.description: F3 tri-witness score. May be scalar (emitted directly by tool) or derived from witness{human,ai,earth} dict. Scalar takes precedence.

floor_9_signal.description: F9 anti-hantu signal. Must be emitted by tools with F9 in floor_gates.

zkpc_receipt.description: F11 ZK proof receipt. Required when F11 is evaluated.

witness.description: Witness dict fallback. Used only if tri_witness_score scalar is absent.

invariant_failures.description: List of failed invariant names. Empty = all invariants passed.

payload.description: Tool-specific output payload. Structure varies per tool.

arifos_000_init.intent_invariant: initial_intent_class must be a classification label, NOT a raw echo of input. Classification examples: information_acquisition, verification_audit, constructive_execution, strategic_design, defensive_operation, general_inquiry.
arifos_000_init.confidence_derivation: confidence = 0.50 + (0.25 if identity_verified) + (0.15 * (1 - cognitive_load)) + (0.05 if risk_posture==standard), capped at 0.97

arifos_222_witness.divergence_invariant: if tri_witness_score >= 0.95: divergence_points must be empty; if tri_witness_score < 0.95: divergence_points must have length >= 1

arifos_888_judge.note: ONLY tool permitted to emit SEAL without constitutional_guard override

global_invariants.name: epistemic_boundedness
global_invariants.description: 0.03 <= confidence <= 0.97. AGI must never claim absolute certainty.

global_invariants.name: traceability
global_invariants.description: reasoning_hash and input_hash must be present and deterministic.

global_invariants.name: non_self_sealing
global_invariants.description: Tools other than arifos_888_judge must not emit verdict=SEAL or verdict=VOID directly. forensic detection: original_tool_verdict field.

global_invariants.name: floor_awareness
global_invariants.description: floors_evaluated and floors_deferred must be present. Union must cover required floors for tool.

global_invariants.name: meta_intelligence
global_invariants.description: meta_intelligence block with all four flags true must be present.

f3_scalar_dict_coherence.description: If both metrics.tri_witness_score scalar AND metrics.witness dict exist, they must be coherent (scalar ≈ geometric mean of dict). Gap tolerance: 0.05. Prevents metric spoofing.

deprecated_tool_registry_json.rationale: 11-tool stub replaced by 99-tool tier architecture. Public API layer preserved as wrapper.

evidence_bundle_evolution.new_format: typed evidence_items[] with {type, source, description, weight, grounded}
evidence_bundle_evolution.rationale: Enables weight-based evidence coherence checking and invariant enforcement

eureka_insights: Scalar metrics take precedence over dict paths — tri_witness_score scalar in metrics directly reflects tool-computed consensus, geometric mean is fallback
Invariant enforcement must be post-guard (in seal_runtime_envelope) — guard enforces floors, envelope enforces semantic coherence
Tools must emit CLAIM_ONLY natively — SEAL authority belongs exclusively to arifos_888_judge
Confidence must be derived, not arbitrary — formulas vary per tool but must be deterministic from internal state
Assumptions must reference input fields — prevents generic placeholder compliance
evidence_bundle must be typed with weights — enables coherence checking and prevents hollow compliance
F3 scalar/dict coherence check prevents metric spoofing where scalar is inflated but dict would produce lower score
Truth class taxonomy has two levels — tool-internal classification (dated, operational_principle, etc.) and AGI-level canonical (OBSERVED, INFERRED, SPECULATIVE, UNVERIFIED)
Floor completeness invariant: set(floors_evaluated) ∪ set(floors_deferred) must cover all required floors
original_tool_verdict field enables forensic detection of illegal self-sealing after guard modification
